use_cases: Displaying project milestones and roadmap phases in a visually engaging circular layout
Showing career history or professional journey in an orbital timeline format
Visualizing event sequences or process flows with animated orbital elements
Presenting learning paths or course progress in an interactive radial timeline
Creating interactive product roadmap or feature release timelines
ai_summary: An interactive radial orbital timeline component that displays chronological events or milestones in a circular, space-themed layout with orbital animation effects. Features hover interactions and potentially scroll-triggered animations. Commonly used for project roadmaps, career timelines, and event visualizations in modern SaaS and portfolio applications.
